message:
🌱 Add clickhouse: Official ARM image for Docker mission (#989)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "clickhouse-22222-official-arm-image-for-docker",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "clickhouse: Official ARM image for Docker",
+    "description": "Official ARM image for Docker. Requested by 56+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current ClickHouse setup",
+        "description": "Verify your ClickHouse version and platform:\n```bash\nclickhouse-client --version\nuname -m\n```\nThis feature provides official ARM64 Docker images."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review ARM Docker image availability",
+        "description": "ClickHouse provides official multi-architecture Docker images supporting both amd64 and arm64 (AArch64). Use `clickhouse/clickhouse-server` (not the old `yandex/clickhouse-server` which may lack ARM support)."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Run ClickHouse on ARM",
+        "description": "Pull and run the official multi-arch image:\n```bash\ndocker run -d \\\n  --name clickhouse-server \\\n  --ulimit nofile=262144:262144 \\\n  -p 8123:8123 -p 9000:9000 \\\n  clickhouse/clickhouse-server:latest\n```\n\nFor Docker Compose:\n```yaml\nservices:\n  clickhouse:\n    image: clickhouse/clickhouse-server:latest\n    ports:\n      - \"8123:8123\"\n      - \"9000:9000\"\n    ulimits:\n      nofile:\n        soft: 262144\n        hard: 262144\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify ARM image works",
+        "description": "Connect and verify:\n```bash\nclickhouse-client --query \"SELECT version(), hostName()\"\n```\nConfirm the server is running natively on ARM64."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "ClickHouse now provides official multi-architecture Docker images (amd64 and arm64) under clickhouse/clickhouse-server.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "clickhouse",
+      "community",
+      "analytics-db",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+      "clickhouse"
+    ],

+    },

+  },
+  "prerequisites": {

+      "docker",
+      "clickhouse-client"
+    ],
+    "description": "Docker installed on an ARM64 or amd64 system."
+  },
